name: Nang Kuang Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Nang Kuang Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. operates as a pharmaceutical company primarily in Taiwan. The company provides parenterals, aseptic parenterals, lyophilized injections, pre-filled syringes, and pre-mixed IV infusion bags, as well as tablets, capsules, topical products, and oral suspensions. It offers various products in the areas of cardiovascular system, gastrointestinal system, nervous system, alimentary and metabolism, blood, antineoplastic and immunomodulatory, musculo-skeletal system, respiratory system, dermatological, genito-urinary and sex hormone, systemic hormone, systemic antibacterial, and cosmetics, as well as hospital solution. Nang Kuang Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. was founded in 1963 and is headquartered in Tainan City, Taiwan.
